class.name: InteractiveGrid
class.brief_description: Represents a 3D interactive grid for gameplay. Designed to be extended for tactical or strategy game mechanics.

method.name: get_cell_golbal_position
method.description: Returns the global world‑space position of the cell identified by index.

method.name: get_cell_index_from_global_position
method.description: Returns the linear index of the grid cell that is closest to the supplied world‑space position.

method.name: get_grid_center_position
method.description: Returns the central position of the interactive grid in world coordinates.

method.name: get_grid_visible
method.description: Checks if the combat grid has been created.

method.name: get_latest_selected
method.description: Returns the most recently selected cell from the user's selection.

method.name: get_path
method.description: Computes a path between two cells on the grid using A* pathfinding.

method.name: get_selected_cells
method.description: Returns an array of all cells currently marked as selected by the user.

method.name: hide_distant_cells
method.description: Iterates over all grid cells and hides those located farther than the specified distance from the start cell.

method.name: hide_inaccessible_cells
method.description:
Iterates over all grid cells and marks as inaccessible those cells that cannot be reached from the specified start cell.
TODO: Improve performance: current implementation iterates through all cells and calculates paths for each, which can be slow for large grids.

method.name: highlight_on_hover
method.description: Updates hover highlighting – finds the cell under the mouse, clears any previous hover, and applies the hover colour unless the cell is already selected.

method.name: highlight_path
method.description: Highlights a given path on the grid by changing the color of each cell along the path to the predefined _path_color.

method.name: is_grid_created
method.description: Checks if the combat grid has been created.

method.name: reset_cells_state
method.description: Resets the state of all cells in the grid to their default data.

method.name: select_cell
method.description: Selects a grid cell based on a world‑space position.

method.name: set_grid_visible
method.description: Sets the visibility of the combat grid.
